talkToUs.title: Talk to Us
talkToUs.description: Share an issue, message, or story. Your message will be sent to our team via email.

home.brand: Life Upside View — Mental Health Foundation
home.heroDescription: Emotional wellness and recovery through lived stories, practical tools, and access to help for those navigating anxiety, depression, trauma, and emotional overwhelm.
home.whoWeSupportH2: A platform for those carrying what words rarely capture — anxiety, depression, trauma, grief, burnout — and the caregivers, young people, and communities who walk alongside them.
home.supportPath1Desc: Crisis resources, urgent steps, and trusted contacts you can use right now.
home.supportPath2Desc: Grounding techniques, CBT-informed reframes, and short mindfulness practices.
home.supportPath3Desc: Real experiences of anxiety, trauma, recovery, and resilience — told first-hand.
home.missionLine: We don't promise quick answers. We offer honest company — stories, tools, and pathways to support that meet you where you are, in language that respects what you're already carrying.
home.resource1Desc: Practical emotional wellness techniques you can start in minutes.
home.resource2Desc: Quick self-assessment prompts to reflect on stress, mood, and burnout.
home.resource3Desc: When to seek help, what to say, and where to find trusted professional support.
home.crisisLine: If you or someone you know may be in immediate danger, contact local emergency services right away.
home.impactH2: Stories that normalize emotional honesty and inspire recovery-centered action.
home.testimonial1Quote: I came for one story and ended up finding language for what I had been carrying for years.
home.testimonial2Quote: The check-up prompts helped me realize I needed support sooner, not later.
home.testimonial3Quote: This platform made me feel less alone and more capable of asking for help.
home.closingH2: Take the next small step, on your terms.

selfHelp.lede: Short practices designed to reduce overwhelm, regulate emotions, and help you return to steady ground.
selfHelp.reframe1Reframe: I am struggling right now, but I have handled hard things before.
selfHelp.reframe2Reframe: I feel isolated right now, but support is still available and I can ask for it.
selfHelp.reframe3Trigger: If I rest, I am weak.
selfHelp.reframe3Reframe: Rest helps my nervous system recover so I can function better.
selfHelp.moodLede: A simple 1-to-10 read. Use it to gently calibrate what your day needs.
selfHelp.moodLow: Low energy day. Focus on one tiny action: hydrate, breathe, and message someone you trust.
selfHelp.moodModerate: Moderate day. Keep momentum with a short walk, mindful break, and realistic task list.
selfHelp.moodHigher: Higher energy day. Protect your progress with boundaries, sleep, and one meaningful connection.

checkups.h1: A quick read on how you're doing.
checkups.lede: This is not a diagnosis. It's a reflection tool to help you decide whether you might benefit from extra support.
checkups.q1: Over the last 2 weeks, I have felt persistently low, anxious, or emotionally exhausted.
checkups.q2: I have had difficulty sleeping, concentrating, or completing daily tasks.
checkups.q3: I feel disconnected from people or activities I usually enjoy.
checkups.q4: I have been using avoidance, substances, or unhealthy coping to get through stress.
checkups.q5: I have had thoughts that life is not worth it or that I might harm myself.
checkups.resultLowBody: Keep supporting your wellbeing with routines, sleep, and connection.
checkups.resultModerateBody: Consider speaking to someone you trust and using practical coping tools this week.
checkups.resultElevatedBody: A mental health professional can help you with a care plan and support.
checkups.resultHighBody: Please seek professional or crisis support as soon as possible.

support.lede: If you are in crisis or feeling unsafe, use this page as a quick action guide. You are not a burden, and asking for help is a strong step.
support.step1: If there is immediate danger, call your local emergency number now.
support.step2: If self-harm thoughts are intense, do not stay alone. Call a trusted person immediately.
support.step3: Move to a safer environment and remove anything you may use to hurt yourself.
support.step4: Reach out to a local crisis line, hospital, or nearest urgent care center.
support.pathwaysH2: Where to turn for ongoing support.
support.option1Desc: Find a licensed therapist, psychologist, psychiatrist, or trauma-informed counselor.
support.option2Desc: Join a peer support group, trusted faith community, or local wellbeing circle.
support.option3Desc: Support someone you love with active listening, safety checks, and practical help.
support.askingH2: What to say when asking for help.
support.askingQuote: I'm not doing okay right now. I need help and I don't want to be alone.
support.askingLede: If you are helping someone else, stay calm, remove immediate danger, and connect them to professional care as quickly as possible.

searchPage.noResults: No results match your search. Try a different term.

write.lede: Your story might be the lifeline someone else is searching for. Tell us in your own words — we read every submission with care.
write.placeholderBio: Tell us a little about yourself

volunteer.lede: Join a community of people offering time, care, and skill in service of mental wellbeing. Tell us a little about yourself and how you'd like to help.
volunteer.placeholderReason: Why do you want to volunteer?
volunteer.placeholderBio: Tell us a little about yourself or your experience

stories.pageSubtitle: Real stories of navigating the unseen — and finding light in it
stories.storiesThatHealDesc: Reflections, reckonings, and revelations — told by those who've lived them.
stories.allStoriesDesc: Read every inspiring, honest, and deeply personal story shared on Life Upside View.
stories.diveDeeperDesc: Get fresh stories, small wins, and honest voices in your inbox — every few weeks.
stories.subscribedDesc: Thank you for subscribing to our newsletter.

evolve.title: Evolve
evolve.subtitle: Growth is not a destination, but a way of seeing. Transform your mindset, one moment at a time.
evolve.cardDescription: Explore reflections, tools, and guidance that help you build resilience and embrace the unexpected.

explore.title: Explore
explore.subtitle: Discover new perspectives and resources that lift your mood and invite deeper curiosity.
explore.cardDescription: Thoughtfully curated tools and content to inspire, educate, and support your emotional wellbeing.

reflect.title: Reflect
reflect.subtitle: Dive into shared insights that help you see life in new ways — with clarity, grace, and deeper meaning.
reflect.cardDescription: Insightful thoughts from the lived experiences of people navigating mental health and growth.

footer.brandDescription: Sharing real stories, offering resources, and providing support to help you navigate life's challenges.
footer.connectDescription: Join our community. Subscribe for inspiring stories and mental health insights.
footer.stayConnected: Stay connected and join the conversation.
footer.copyright: © {year} Life Upside View Mental Health Foundation. All rights reserved.

about.whoWeAreDesc1: Life Upside View is a heartfelt initiative driven by a simple truth: stories heal. We are a collective of advocates, artists, and everyday people committed to creating space for vulnerability, reflection, and transformation.
about.whoWeAreDesc2: Through storytelling and community dialogue, we work to destigmatize mental health, spotlight human resilience, and offer hope — especially in places where silence often wins.
about.ourMissionDesc1: To amplify lived experiences and elevate conversations around mental health, trauma, and healing — especially within African communities and underrepresented voices.
about.ourMissionDesc2: We strive to normalize emotional honesty, honor pain and joy equally, and build spaces where people feel seen, heard, and valued — just as they are.
about.empathyDesc: We listen with compassion and lead with kindness.
about.authenticityDesc: Every voice matters, and every story is valid.
about.communityDesc: Healing doesn't happen in isolation — we show up together.
about.transparencyDesc: We share our truths and honor others' with respect.
about.resilienceDesc: We believe in the human spirit's ability to rise and rebuild.
about.ourLeadershipDesc: Meet the people behind Life Upside View — storytellers, advocates, and everyday changemakers committed to mental wellness and meaningful connection.

story1.title: From Broken Bones To Unbreakable Dreams

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.whoWeAreText: At lifeupsideview.org, we are committed to maintaining the trust and confidence of all visitors to our website. We do not sell, rent, or trade email lists with other companies and businesses for marketing purposes. This Privacy Policy provides detailed information on when and why we collect personal information, how we use it, the limited conditions under which we may disclose it to others, and how we keep it secure.
privacyPolicy.cookiesText: We may set and access cookies on your computer to provide our system with the basic information required to deliver the services you request. Cookies can be cleared at any time from your internet browser settings.
privacyPolicy.googleAnalyticsText: When someone visits lifeupsideview.org, we use a third-party service, Google Analytics, to collect standard internet log information and details of visitor behaviour patterns. This information is processed in a way which does not identify anyone. We do not make, and do not allow Google to make, any attempt to find out the identities of visitors to our website.
privacyPolicy.websiteCommentsText: When someone visits lifeupsideview.org, there may be an ability to submit comments on particular articles or pages. When comments are submitted, you are entitled to use aliases or information that completely hides your identity. Relevant details (name, email, website) that you provide are stored to display your comment back to you and to anyone viewing the comment sections. We do not verify information entered nor do we require verification.
privacyPolicy.thirdPartiesText: There may be some circumstances where your IP address, geographic location, and other browser-related details may be shared with third-party companies. We may share your above-mentioned data with third-party companies from time to time.
privacyPolicy.accessToInfoText: You are entitled to view, amend, or delete the personal information that we hold. Email your request to our data protection officer Revens at dataprotection@lifeupsideview.org and we will work with you to remove any of your personal data we may have.
privacyPolicy.changesText: We may make changes to our Privacy Policy in the future; the most current version will govern our processing of your personal data and will always be available to you. If we make a material change, we will notify you by update or email, where possible. By continuing to access or use our services, you agree to be bound to the terms of our Privacy Policy.

termsOfService.title: Terms of Service
termsOfService.introductionText: Welcome to lifeupsideview.org. By accessing or using our website, you agree to comply with and be bound by these Terms of Service. Please read them carefully.
termsOfService.acceptanceText: By using this site, you signify your acceptance of these terms. If you do not agree, please do not use our site. We reserve the right to update or change these terms at any time.
termsOfService.userResponsibilitiesText: You agree to use this site only for lawful purposes and in a way that does not infringe the rights of, restrict, or inhibit anyone else's use and enjoyment of the site.
termsOfService.intellectualPropertyText: All content on this site, including text, graphics, logos, and images, is the property of lifeupsideview.org or its content suppliers and is protected by copyright laws. Unauthorized use is prohibited.
termsOfService.limitationText: We do our best to ensure the accuracy of information on this site, but we make no warranties or guarantees. We are not liable for any loss or damage arising from your use of the site.
termsOfService.changesText: We may update these Terms of Service from time to time. Continued use of the site after any changes constitutes your acceptance of the new terms.
termsOfService.contactText: If you have any questions about these Terms, please contact us at dataprotection@lifeupsideview.org.

cookiePolicy.title: Cookie Policy
cookiePolicy.whatAreCookiesText: Cookies are small text files stored on your device by your browser when you visit websites. They help websites remember your preferences and improve your experience.
cookiePolicy.howWeUseText: We use cookies to understand how you interact with our site, remember your preferences, and enhance your experience. Some cookies are essential for the site to function properly.
cookiePolicy.managingText: You can control and delete cookies through your browser settings. Please note that disabling cookies may affect the functionality of our website.
cookiePolicy.thirdPartyText: Some cookies may be set by third-party services we use, such as analytics providers. We do not control these cookies, and you should check the respective third-party websites for more information.
cookiePolicy.changesText: We may update this Cookie Policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page, and your continued use of the site constitutes acceptance of those changes.
cookiePolicy.contactText: If you have any questions about our Cookie Policy, please contact us at dataprotection@lifeupsideview.org.
